title: polystichum muricatum
intro: Polystichum muricatum, also known as the scaly male fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polystichum muricatum include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
